Science · Grade 2
Quarter 1 · Week 2 — Cycles of Nature/Insects
🔬 🌱 🌦️ ⚡ 🪨 🌊 🦋
🎮
Mini Game
Butterfly Body Explorer

Click each glowing part of the butterfly to learn what it does!
Find all 4 parts to become a Butterfly Expert 🦋⭐

🟠
Wings
Butterfly wings are covered in thousands of tiny scales — that's what makes the amazing patterns and colors!
📡
Antennae
Antennae help the butterfly smell flowers and sense the wind. They work like a nose and compass combined!
🦶
Legs
Butterflies have 6 legs and they can TASTE with them! They step on a leaf to find out if it's the right food for their eggs.
🌸
Proboscis
The proboscis is like a long straw! The butterfly unrolls it to sip sweet nectar from deep inside flowers.
🦋⭐ Butterfly Expert!
You discovered all 4 body parts — amazing work!
⬇️
